title: regex -- Regular Expressions
description: A fast regular expression library for Rust. Guarantees linear-time matching (no catastrophic backtracking), supports Unicode, and provides capture groups, find/replace, and splitting. The standard choice for regex in Rust.

commonPatterns.title: Compile once with LazyLock
Named capture groups
Split by regex pattern
Replace with capture group references

whenToUse: Text searching, validation (emails, URLs, phone numbers), parsing semi-structured text, log analysis, find-and-replace transformations, and splitting text by complex patterns.
alternatives: glob (for file path patterns only), aho-corasick (multiple literal string search, very fast), fancy-regex (supports lookahead/lookbehind but not linear-time). For full parsing: nom, pest, winnow.
